title: SENIOR COMPANION AND FOSTER GRANDPARENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: AMERICORPS OFFICE PENDLETON SENIOR COMPANION AND FOSTER GRANDPARENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides volunteer opportunities. Participants can volunteer with the Foster Grandparent Program or Senior Companion Program. Foster Grandparent Program engages low income seniors age 55 and older in providing one-on-one mentoring and academic support to children with special or exceptional needs. Senior Companion Program engages low income seniors age 55 and older in providing supportive, individualized services to help homebound seniors and other adults maintain their dignity and independence. 221 S Main Street Suite 4 Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Age 55 and older. Must be able to pass a background check and meet income guidelines. Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 276-6074 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-6074 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-6074 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker, Crook, Deschutes, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Jefferson, Malhuer, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Union, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Senior Corps Volunteer Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AMERICORPS OFFICE PENDLETON
